title: bidens holwayi
intro: Bidens holwayi, also known as Holway's beggar-ticks, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bidens holwayi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote the healing of injuries. Bidens holwayi is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
